name: Hot Roquefort Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cream cheese in a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds or until the cheese is soft.
2. Add the Roquefort cheese, chopped walnuts, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce; stir to blend.
3. Spread the cheese mixture on crackers. Arrange a maximum of 10 canapes on a large paper plate or heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter lined with a paper or cloth napkin.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 45 seconds to 1 minute or until the cheese begins to melt.
5. Top each canape with a piece of chopped walnut and serve hot.
Variation: Blue cheese, sharp Cheddar cheese, or any strong-flavored cheese may be substituted for the Roquefort cheese.
